interpretation.message: This query matches multiple authored concepts and requires an explicit choice.

message: Multiple canonical concepts match this query. Choose one to continue.

candidates.title: Rights
candidates.shortDefinition: Rights are recognized claims or entitlements that a person or group may hold.

candidates.title: Human Rights
candidates.shortDefinition: Human rights are basic claims attached to persons by virtue of being human.

candidates.title: Legal Rights
candidates.shortDefinition: Legal rights are claims or protections recognized within a legal system.
